name: foundry
description: Piyush's agentic infrastructure — memory curation, project-compass, review, orchestration, and dev-environment plugins.

plugins.name: crucible
plugins.description: Lens x stance review system: consult (partner), audit (neutral single reviewer), hats (blind panel), and red-vs-blue (attack/verify pair) on a shared hat wardrobe.

plugins.name: devtools
plugins.description: Dev-environment tooling — worktree-native lifecycle (add/check/archive/revive/reap) with memory and serena wiring.

plugins.name: manifold
plugins.description: KAOS project compass — a DB-canonical spec substrate with an MCP server exposing read/write tools over a project's goal graph.

plugins.name: meditate
plugins.description: Reflective memory curation: pause → review → consolidate → release. Audits Claude memory + CLAUDE.md (+ serena if active), proposes dispositions via a read-only Opus curator agent, gates, and executes approved changes with archive-not-destroy safety.

plugins.name: plan-orchestrator
plugins.description: Orchestrate multi-agent plans with live dispatch telemetry. Bundles the progress-tracker MCP, the brief and subset scoping skills, and the full review capability (audit, hats, red-vs-blue + stance agents) composed from the shared library.
